TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: pnayt pnayt hya' ga yasa qu 'agal oulih na 'tayal, sraral ka ungat nanu' qaya' na agal qulih hga, mutuw siy si' sgogyu' ru psabu' nanak ha, ru musa' tmuba', aring mwah qu gipun lga, yasa qu mwah pcbaq sa pnayt qulih la, pnayt qani hya' ga, iwan musa' hmyapas na hmiriq ryax, maha ciriq lga, nanu' yaqu mhhuluy sa qulih qasa qu blaq haypasun na squliq.
S.PHON: pnajt pnajt ńßja Ē …£a jas~…ēa qu Ēa…£al oulińß na Ētajal, s~…ēraral ka uŇčat nanu Ē qaja Ē na a…£al qulińß ńß…£a, mutuw s~…ēij s~…ēi Ē s~…ē…£o…£ju Ē ru ps~…ēaő≤u Ē nanak ńßa, ru mus~…ēa Ē tmuő≤a Ē, ariŇč mwańß qu …£ipun l…£a, jas~…ēa qu mwańß p ¶~ ®ő≤aq s~…ēa pnajt qulińß la, pnajt qani ńßja Ē …£a, iwan mus~…ēa Ē ńßmjapas~…ē na ńßmiriq rjax, mańßa ¶~ ®iriq l…£a, nanu Ē jaqu mńßńßuluj s~…ēa qulińß qas~…ēa qu ő≤laq ńßajpas~…ēun na s~…ēquliq.
S.FORM: pnayt pnayt hya' ga yasa qu 'agal oulih na 'tayal, sraral ka ungat nanu' qaya' na agal qulih hga, mutuw siy si' sgogyu' ru psabu' nanak ha, ru musa' tmuba', aring mwah qu gipun lga, yasa qu mwah pcbaq sa pnayt qulih la, pnayt qani hya' ga, iwan musa' hmyapas na hmiriq ryax, maha ciriq lga, nanu' yaqu mhhuluy sa qulih qasa qu blaq haypasun na squliq.
S.PHON: pnajt pnajt ńßja Ē …£a jas~…ēa qu Ēa…£al oulińß na Ētajal, s~…ēraral ka uŇčat nanu Ē qaja Ē na a…£al qulińß ńß…£a, mutuw s~…ēij s~…ēi Ē s~…ē…£o…£ju Ē ru ps~…ēaő≤u Ē nanak ńßa, ru mus~…ēa Ē tmuő≤a Ē, ariŇč mwańß qu …£ipun l…£a, jas~…ēa qu mwańß p ¶~ ®ő≤aq s~…ēa pnajt qulińß la, pnajt qani ńßja Ē …£a, iwan mus~…ēa Ē ńßmjapas~…ē na ńßmiriq rjax, mańßa ¶~ ®iriq l…£a, nanu Ē jaqu mńßńßuluj s~…ēa qulińß qas~…ēa qu ő≤laq ńßajpas~…ēun na s~…ēquliq.
